traits.traditional_use: diabetes and oxidative stress management in traditional medicine

notes.en: Adapted to both Dry and Wet zones; high-protein high-zinc red rice used in Ayurveda for diabetes support.

traits.quote: Rath suwandel is a crop cultivated in both the dry and wet zones. It has red, medium-sized grains which are high in protein and zinc, and in traditional medicine, it is used for the treatment of diabetes and oxidative stress.
